title: The Blossom
content:
Merry, merry sparrow!
    Under leaves so green
    A happy blossom
    Sees you, swift as arrow,
    Seek your cradle narrow,
    Near my bosom.
    Pretty, pretty robin!
    Under leaves so green
    A happy blossom
    Hears you sobbing, sobbing,
    Pretty, pretty robin,
    Near my bosom.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Blake delivers a powerful performance in "The Blossom"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
